text.title: api-documentation Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for api-documentation as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: A single example covering only the happy path with no edge cases.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Developers copy the example verbatim; untested inputs (special characters, optional fields, boundary values) cause production errors.
